_comment: Copy this file to nightshift.config.json and adjust as needed. All values shown are defaults. Env vars override file values: NIGHTSHIFT_PORT, NIGHTSHIFT_HOST, NIGHTSHIFT_DB_PATH, NIGHTSHIFT_LOG_LEVEL.

providers._cma: V3 Anthropic Managed Agents (CMA) provider plugin — default OFF. Set cmaEnabled + cmaModel; secrets via env CMA_API_KEY (optional CMA_BASE_URL, default https://api.anthropic.com/v1). Goes through the conformance harness like every driver.

forge._baseUrl: Override API base URL for self-hosted instances, e.g. https://gitlab.example.com or https://codeberg.org/api/v1

tournament._comment: When enabled, each review round runs defaultReviewer + challengerProvider in parallel and synthesizes the union of findings (stricter verdict wins). Enable to increase review coverage at the cost of 2× reviewer tokens.
tournament._tiebreaker: V3 three-model tiebreaker: when the two reviewers disagree on the verdict, this third provider casts the deciding vote. Empty ⇒ fail-closed to the stricter verdict (revise wins).

container._comment: V3 container isolation per run — opt-in level ABOVE worktree-only (network+fs limits). Requires docker/podman on the Linux host; fail-closed off-Linux.

workers._comment: V3 multi-VM workers — worker daemons register with the single control plane and heartbeat; a worker silent past leaseSeconds is reclaimed.

cliUpdate._comment: V3 CLI auto-update — factory keeps agent CLIs (claude/codex/gemini) current and surfaces version status. Live update exec runs on the Linux host.

preview._comment: V3 preview environments — every run gets run-<id>.<domain>, auto-reaped when idle. Empty domain ⇒ disabled (fail-closed). Live deploy/reverse-proxy/DNS runs on the Linux host.

selfOptimize._comment: V3 prompt self-optimization — bounded hill-climb over a prompt (propose→evaluate→keep-iff-better). Live propose/evaluate spawn runs on the Linux host.
